calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing and Enforcement of Stipulated Judgment entered on May 22, 2006.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anthony D. Agpaoa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Reverendo Carlos Mejia, whose appearance was waived at the next calling of the case.
No appearance by defendant Jose Ovidio Rodas Herrera.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Reverendo Carlos Mejia, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jose Ovidio Rodas Herrera as follows:

Damages/Principal - $17,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $343.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $17,343.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell.
Anthony Agpaoa, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Reverando Carlos Mejia.
Leeds Disston, Esq. for and with Defendant: Jose Ovidio Rodas Herrera, present without an Interpreter.
Parties have settled, terms not read into the record.
Matter will be placed on CRC-225 Dismissal calendar for Dec. 4, 2007 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212, for stautus report of the settlement/payments.
